tags.name: `mc-input-time`
tags.description:
Purpose: Component for user text input with various customization options.
Category: Forms
When to use: When you need a time input field with customizable options.
When not to use: When you have a simple text input without time-specific features.
Works with components: mc-accordion-item, mc-card, mc-dialog, mc-drawer, mc-modal, mc-popover, mc-step-indicator-item, mc-table, mc-tabs
Alternative component names: Time Input, Time Picker, Time Selection Input, Time Field, Time Entry

Events:

  * `input` {`InputEvent`} - Fired when the character is entered.

  * `focus` {`FocusEvent`} - Fired when mc-input-time is focused.

  * `blur` {`FocusEvent`} - Fired when mc-input-time is going out of focus.

  * `click` {`MouseEvent`} - Fired on mc-input-time click.

  * `keydown` {`KeyboardEvent`} - Fired when a key on keydown is pressed.

Slots:

  * ``label`` {} - The label HTML to use for the mc-input-time.

  * ``hint`` {} - The hint HTML to use for the mc-input-time.

  * ``errormessage`` {} - The errormessage HTML to use for the mc-input-time.

Attributes:

  * `open` {`boolean | undefined`} - only for the purpose of VR tests

  * `placeholder` {`string`} - 

  * `hourstep` {`number`} - A numeric value that indicates the level of granularity that the hour items must meet.
It can range between greater than 1 and less than 23. For more details, see the examples.

  * `minutestep` {`number`} - A numeric value that indicates the level of granularity that the minute items must meet.
It can range between greater than 1 and less than 59. For more details, see the examples.

  * `preselectcurrenttime` {`boolean`} - True, if the current local time must be preselected.

  * `timepickerposition` {`Position`} - Position on the timepicker.

Properties:

  * `debouncedSetSelectedTime` - 

  * `timePicker` - 

  * `time` {`string | null | undefined`} - 

  * `open` {`boolean | undefined`} - only for the purpose of VR tests

  * `placeholder` {`string`} - 

  * `mcPopover` - 

  * `minlength` {`number`} - 

  * `maxlength` {`number`} - 

  * `trailingicon` {`string`} - 

  * `autocomplete` {`string`} - 

  * `inputmode` {`string`} - 

  * `hourstep` {`number`} - A numeric value that indicates the level of granularity that the hour items must meet.
It can range between greater than 1 and less than 23. For more details, see the examples.

  * `minutestep` {`number`} - A numeric value that indicates the level of granularity that the minute items must meet.
It can range between greater than 1 and less than 59. For more details, see the examples.

  * `preselectcurrenttime` {`boolean`} - True, if the current local time must be preselected.

  * `timepickerposition` {`Position`} - Position on the timepicker.

  * `bodyOverflow` {`string | undefined`} - 

  * `bodyPostion` {`string | undefined`} - 

  * `windowScrollTop` {`number | undefined`} - 

  * `viewport` {`Viewport | undefined`} - 

  * `viewportResizeHandlerInFullScreenModal` - This is to revert modal body being pushed by the keyboard when
modal is displayed upon focusing on an input,
or close the modal when doing window resize while the modal is open.

  * `handleResize` -

attributes.description:
`open` {`boolean | undefined`} - only for the purpose of VR tests

Property: open

attributes.name: placeholder
attributes.description:
`placeholder` {`string`} - 

Property: placeholder

Default: --:--

attributes.name: hourstep
attributes.description:
`hourstep` {`number`} - A numeric value that indicates the level of granularity that the hour items must meet.
It can range between greater than 1 and less than 23. For more details, see the examples.

Property: hourstep

Default: 1

attributes.name: minutestep
attributes.description:
`minutestep` {`number`} - A numeric value that indicates the level of granularity that the minute items must meet.
It can range between greater than 1 and less than 59. For more details, see the examples.

Property: minutestep

Default: 1

attributes.name: preselectcurrenttime
attributes.description:
`preselectcurrenttime` {`boolean`} - True, if the current local time must be preselected.

Property: preselectcurrenttime

Default: false

`timepickerposition` {`Position`} - Position on the timepicker.

Property: timepickerposition

Default: bottom-left
